summary.zhHant: Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate is a practical two-person French / European / Western dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.yue: Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate is a practical two-person French / European / Western dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.en: Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate is a practical two-person French / European / Western dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.

Included as a light seasoning estimate; users can reduce salt to taste.

detail.zhHant: Set out Ground beef, Potatoes, Tomatoes, Canned tomatoes, Cheese, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.yue: Set out Ground beef, Potatoes, Tomatoes, Canned tomatoes, Cheese, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.en: Set out Ground beef, Potatoes, Tomatoes, Canned tomatoes, Cheese, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.

detail.zhHant: Toss Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.yue: Toss Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.en: Toss Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.

detail.zhHant: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.yue: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.en: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.

detail.zhHant: Rest Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.yue: Rest Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.en: Rest Ground Beef Potato Gratin Plate for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
